stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Given the following information, calculate the expected obstacle clearance overhead the antenna for a single engine piston aircraft at its FLLTOM (Field Length Limited Take-Off Mass) on a straight out departure from Runway 27 in VMC.

Aerodrome elevation: MSL
Climb gradient: 6%
True Airspeed: 110 kt
Headwind component: 20 kt
1NM = 6080 ft
Height Difference = [(Ground Distance x TAS)/GS] x Gradient(%)/100
